message:
feat(fnp-python): port 15 math functions from passthrough to native Rust

Ported to native_unary_promoting with NumPy fallback for complex/integer:
- Trigonometric: sin, cos, arcsin, arccos, arctan
- Hyperbolic: sinh, cosh, tanh, arcsinh, arccosh, arctanh
- Logarithmic/exponential: log, exp, sqrt
- Identity: positive

Includes conformance_trig_math.rs with 11 tests covering 100+ input cases
across all functions, including edge cases (inf, nan, domain boundaries),
integer promotion verification, and empty array handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
